title: Primary Research Analyst
description: Primary Research Analyst role at global pharma/biotech consultancy. Conduct telephone interviews with industry stakeholders, attend conferences, network with pharma/biotech professionals. Research global market trends, regulatory requirements, price developments. Support clients with insights for business decisions. Requires relationship-building skills, result-oriented mindset, strong analytical skills, excellent communication. Academic background in pharmacy/biotech advantageous but not required. Fluent English required, additional languages appreciated.
match_reasons: Pharma consulting experience (IQVIA 3 months)|Strong analytical and quantitative skills (DTU, Novo Nordisk)|Communication and stakeholder engagement experience|Bioinformatics/biotech academic background|Fluent English, international experience|Research mindset and data analysis skills
gaps: No primary research/interview experience|No conference networking experience|Limited consulting track record (3 months vs. likely 1-2 years expected)|No additional languages beyond English/Chinese|Entry-level vs. potentially mid-level role
